text:
In the first scene, I find myself as an observer outside a glass-walled room where a class or meeting is in session. I feel a sense of separation, like an outsider looking into a world of collaboration, my curiosity piqued yet tinged with mild isolation. The sterile environment and the order inside contrast with my own possibly transient presence in the corridor. 

In the second scene, I am enveloped by vibrant colors and engaging displays in what seems to be an exhibit focused on research and innovation. This space feels more inviting; the energy here stirs my curiosity and inspires a sense of possibility—an eagerness to learn and discover how humans and machines dance together in mutual evolution.
